title: Ultra Optimized
description: A competitor to Simply and Fabulously Optimized, but instead of 10-20 mods, there's 120 of them, all meant to make Minecraft run at light speed.
body: This modpack gets around 290 fps, in 1440p fancy, on a computer with 6 cores and 4gb of VRAM. Even on a potato this modpack runs incredibly smooth, allowing anyone to have the luxery of high end performance. This modpack goes past just having sodium and iris, including mods to make trigonometric calculations superfast, to making leaves less laggy.
